# Muhammad Junaid Ali Asif Raja

> Machine Learning Researcher and Direct PhD student at National Yunlin University of Science and Technology, Taiwan. Works on Fractional Machine Learning / Deep Learning: intelligent neural surrogates for nonlinear and fractional-order dynamical systems, fractional-calculus-inspired deep learning optimization, and physics-informed neural networks for fractional systems. 30 publications, 27 indexed in the WoS Core Collection (h-index 10, 221 Google Scholar citations). Author of zij, a reference library cataloguing 740 deep learning optimization algorithms across 11 categories with 100+ PyTorch implementations.

## About

- [Home / Bio]({{ site.url }}/): Brief introduction, current news feed, and selected publications.
- [About Me]({{ site.url }}/about/): Full academic profile: education, awards, research collaborators, skills, languages, and personal interests.
- [Publications]({{ site.url }}/publications/): Full bibliography of 30 WoS-indexed publications with live Google Scholar metrics.
- [CV (PDF)]({{ site.url }}/assets/pdf/cv.pdf): Downloadable academic CV.

## Projects

- [Projects index]({{ site.url }}/projects/): Public projects on this site.
- [zij]({{ site.url }}/projects/zij/) (companion site: https://junaidaliop.github.io/zij/, source: https://github.com/junaidaliop/zij): A canon of deep learning optimization algorithms. 740 methods across 11 categories, with 100+ implemented as a PyTorch library. Released under Apache-2.0.
- [ISIC-2024 SLICE-3D]({{ site.url }}/projects/isic2024_tbp/) (companion site: https://junaidaliop.github.io/isic2024-tbp/, source: https://github.com/junaidaliop/isic2024-tbp): A single-dataset, no-external-data, no-synthetic study of melanoma triage. Headline result: 0.1738 stack OOF pAUC@80%TPR at 15.84M parameters and 60.9 ms CPU latency.

## External profiles

- [Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=9VTFIJcAAAAJ): All publications, citation metrics, h-index.
- [ORCID](https://orcid.org/0009-0008-9249-9983): Persistent researcher identifier.
- [GitHub](https://github.com/junaidaliop): Open-source code and project repositories.

## Research focus

Most of this work sits under one umbrella, Fractional Machine Learning / Deep Learning: machine-learning methods that model, solve, or are inspired by fractional-order systems and fractional calculus.

- Intelligent neural surrogates for nonlinear and fractional-order dynamical systems
- Physics-informed neural networks (PINNs)
- Fractional-calculus-inspired deep-learning optimization algorithms
- Autoregressive exogenous (NARX / NN-ARX) neuroarchitectures with Bayesian regularization
- Computational neuroscience: neuronal models (Hindmarsh-Rose, FitzHugh-Nagumo, Rabinovich-Fabrikant, locally active memristive)
- Plankton, marine-ecosystem, and aquatic dynamics modeling
- Malware propagation in cyber-physical systems (SCADA, Industrial IoT, mobile)
- Chaotic attractor reconstruction (Lorenz-Lü-Chen and related)

## Selected venues

Chaos, Solitons & Fractals · Water Research · IEEE Transactions on Computational Biology and Bioinformatics · Nonlinear Dynamics · Engineering Applications of Artificial Intelligence · Applied Soft Computing · Computers in Biology and Medicine · Biomedical Signal Processing and Control · Communications in Nonlinear Science and Numerical Simulation · International Journal of Computer Mathematics · CMES · Process Safety and Environmental Protection · Heliyon · Journal of Industrial Information Integration · International Journal of Information Security · Computational Biology and Chemistry · Environmental Monitoring and Assessment · Journal of Thermal Analysis and Calorimetry · Nano

## Affiliation

- Direct PhD Student, Dept. of Computer Science and Information Engineering, National Yunlin University of Science and Technology (YunTech), Yunlin, Taiwan.
- Supervisor: Prof. Chuan-Yu Chang (MIPL Lab).
- Research mentor: Prof. Muhammad Asif Zahoor Raja.
- Alumnus: School of Electrical Engineering and Computer Science (SEECS), National University of Sciences and Technology (NUST), Islamabad, Pakistan.

## Honors

- Phi Tau Phi Scholastic Honor Society member: top 2% of graduate master's students, Republic of China.
- Selected for Direct PhD program (Sept 2025), YunTech.
